title: The Consequence of Forgotten Doors
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A demolition crew in Oslo keeps finding doorframes in buildings that lead to rooms that were never built — and the rooms contain furniture, letters, and photographs belonging to people who never existed in this world, yet match the crew's own deepest regrets.
long_description: A demolition crew in Oslo keeps finding doorframes in buildings that lead to rooms that were never built — and the rooms contain furniture, letters, and photographs belonging to people who never existed in this world, yet match the crew's own deepest regrets.
main_characters: The Man in the Grey Coat (a recurring figure in every room)
